full_text:
Plan for sample S096 culturing,

Sample: S096_pOme

Cell count:

total: 7.14E6

live: 5.73E6

viability: 80.3%

size: 7.9 um

Total: 28.64 E6 / ml

A) RNA/DNA extraction:

30 wells x 60 µl x = 1800 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 3.60E6 cells

🡪 make 1 x 2 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 126 µl

cells in medium 🡪 1373.2 µl

ome-gel (17.7 mg /mL stock) 🡪 254 µl

aprotinin (10 mg/mL stock) 🡪 5.4 µl

thrombin (100 U stock) 🡪 5.4 µl

fibrinogen (25 ug/mL stock) 🡪 36 µl

B) Control sample for flow + FFPE (d3; 3 drops):

9 wells x 60 µl = 540 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 1.08E6 cells

🡪 make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 38 µl

cells in medium 🡪 411.9 µl

ome-gel 🡪 76.1 µl

aprotinin 🡪 1.6 µl

thrombin 🡪 1.6 µl

fibrinogen 🡪 10.8 µl

total: 7.14E6

live: 5.79E6

viability: 80.7%

size: 8.9 um

C) Drug treatment + FFPE sample (3 drops):

45 wells x 60 µl = 2700 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 5.40E6 cells

🡪 make 2 x 1.5 ml eppendorfs, 1350 µl each

volume to take from cell suspension: 95 µl

cells in medium 🡪 µl

ome-gel 🡪 190.7 µl

aprotinin 🡪 4.1 µl

thrombin 🡪 4.1 µl

fibrinogen 🡪 27 µl

D) IF on drug treatment:

7 conditions x 10 µl x 6 wells/sample = 420 µl,

2000 cells/µl = 0.84E6 cells

🡪 make 1 x 1.5 ml eppendorf

volume to take from cell suspension: 29 µl

cells in medium 🡪 320.8 µl

ome-gel 🡪 59.2 µl

aprotinin 🡪 1.3 µl

thrombin 🡪 1.3 µl

fibrinogen 🡪 8.4 µl

E) Sample for Flow - Day 0

🡪 Collect 3.0E6 cells per 900 uL flow staining buffer

F) For cryo: 2x 7.36E6 cells per 1 mL stemcell banker
